action.shell: tmux display-message -p '#{pane_current_path}' > /tmp/hunk-dir; tmux display-popup -E -w 95% -h 90% -b rounded -S 'fg=#81A1C1,bg=#2e3440' sh -c 'cd "$(cat /tmp/hunk-dir)" && exec hunk diff'
tmux display-message -p '#{pane_current_path}' > /tmp/hunk-dir; tmux display-popup -E -w 95% -h 90% -b rounded -S 'fg=#81A1C1,bg=#2e3440' sh -c 'cd "$(cat /tmp/hunk-dir)" && exec hunk show'
